# public

Static asset directory for `attractor-web` crate. Serves browser-side JavaScript bridging xterm.js to WebSocket backend. Contains terminal initialization code managing session lifecycles, reconnect loops, and Catppuccin Mocha theming.

## Subdirectories

[js/](./js/) Browser-side terminal bootstrap code. Houses [xterm-setup.js](./js/xterm-setup.js) exporting `window.initTerminal` and `window.disposeTerminal`. Manages WebSocket connection to `/api/terminal/ws`, `sessionStorage` session IDs, automatic reconnect logic, and terminal instance registry in `window._terminalInstances`.

## Behavioral Contracts

- WebSocket URL construction: `wss://` or `ws://` + `window.location.host` + `/api/terminal/ws?session=${sessionId}&folder=${folderPath}`
- Session storage key pattern: `'terminal_session_' + containerId`
- Reconnect delay constant: `RECONNECT_DELAY = 1000`
- Reconnect indicator ANSI sequence: `\r\n\x1b[33m[Reconnecting...]\x1b[0m\r\n`
- WebSocket binary type: `ws.binaryType = 'arraybuffer'`
- Resize message format: JSON `{type: 'resize', cols, rows}`
- Session handshake message: JSON `{type: 'session'}` with field `session_id`
- Terminal theme (Catppuccin Mocha):
  - `background: '#1e1e2e'`
  - `foreground: '#cdd6f4'`
  - `cursor: '#f5e0dc'`
  - `selectionBackground: '#585b70'`
  - ANSI palette: black `#45475a`, red `#f38ba8`, green `#a6e3a1`, yellow `#f9e2af`, blue `#89b4fa`, magenta `#f5c2e7`, cyan `#94e2d5`, white `#bac2de`, plus bright variants

## API Surface

`window.initTerminal(containerId, folderPath)` attaches terminal to DOM element `containerId`, initializes WebSocket connection with `buildWsUrl()`, registers instance in `window._terminalInstances`.

`window.disposeTerminal(containerId)` closes `ws`, calls `terminal.dispose()`, clears `reconnectTimer`, disconnects `ResizeObserver`, removes `sessionStorage` key `'terminal_session_' + containerId`, deletes entry from `window._terminalInstances`.

## Resource Registry

`window._terminalInstances` maps container IDs to objects containing `ws`, `terminal`, `fitAddon`, `resizeObserver`, `reconnectTimer`. `getSessionId()` and `setSessionId(id)` wrap `sessionStorage` access for persistent session tracking across reconnects.
